message:
refactor(flow_lattice): scope trusted receipt authorizers per decision contract instead of globally

The trusted_receipt_authorizers field was a flat BTreeSet<VerificationKey>
meaning any trusted key could authorize receipts for any obligation. This
is too permissive — a key trusted for one decision contract should not
automatically be trusted for unrelated contracts.

Changes:
- trusted_receipt_authorizers: BTreeSet<VerificationKey> →
  BTreeMap<String, BTreeSet<VerificationKey>> keyed by decision_contract_id
- Rename trust_receipt_authorizer() → trust_receipt_authorizer_for_contract()
  requiring the caller to specify which decision contract the key is
  authorized for
- apply_declassification receipt verification now looks up the obligation's
  decision_contract_id first, then checks if the receipt's authorizer
  appears in that contract's trusted set
- Error messages updated to include the decision contract ID for triage

All existing tests updated to pass the decision contract ID when trusting
keys. Also includes minor test expansions in static_analysis_graph and
parser_cross_arch_repro_matrix suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
